pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Chocomoo 100％ and 400% Set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Chocomoo 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature the monochromatic illustrations of the artist Chocomoo.  Be sure to add this collectible figure to your collection today!
